responseMessageContents.text:
The sandbox git remote is managed by Rork and I can't modify it due to system restrictions, but that's actually fine since Rork is already syncing the code to the user's GitHub repo at ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest through automated commits. The user's repository already contains the current codebase, with the latest commit from July 9th, 2026.

However, there's a discrepancy: the deployed version on Render is running commit de4cb0b2, which doesn't match the GitHub main HEAD at dcbf86fa — Render may be deploying from a different branch or an older commit, and without Render API credentials I can't verify which repository Render is actually connected to. The sandbox HEAD is also different at e05f66ec, which includes the expo code, suggesting the Rork sync may push after each turn.

I'm limited in what I can do — I can't change the sandbox remote or push manually due to platform restrictions, and I can't configure Render without credentials — but I could potentially check Render's connection status through the user's own /tool/render-status endpoint if needed.

input.command: echo "=== render-status ==="; curl -s -m 15 https://api.ivxholding.com/tool/render-status | head -c 2000; echo; echo "=== is deployed commit on GitHub? ==="; curl -s -m 15 "https://api.github.com/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/commits/de4cb0b294f535d808210de429ff53b56c59402d" | rg '"sha"|"message"|"date"|Not Found' | head -6; echo "=== branches containing it ==="; curl -s -m 15 "https://api.github.com/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/commits/deploy-clean-v2" | rg '"sha"' | head -2

responseMessageContents.text:
So Rork's GitHub sync is connected to the user's own repository with commits from the rork-agent bot, currently at commit dcbf86fa from July 9th. But Render is deployed from a completely different repository and branch with auto-deploy enabled, pointing to an older commit.

The live health and version endpoints both report the Render-deployed commit, which doesn't actually exist in the canonical repository the user specified. I can't modify the sandbox git remote since that's how Rork syncs code back to GitHub, and removing it would break the sync rather than free anything. The real issue is that Render is connected to the wrong repository entirely — that would need to be changed through the Render dashboard or API, but I don't have access to the API key needed to make that change via the Render API.

Verification complete. Here is the report based on live checks (git remote, GitHub API, Render status, production endpoints):

```text
CANONICAL_REPO:            ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest — EXISTS, receiving code
GIT_REMOTE_STATUS:         Sandbox remote = Rork-managed (platform-locked, cannot be
                           changed from inside the project). HOWEVER: Rork's GitHub sync
                           is ALREADY connected to your repo — every change is pushed
                           there automatically by rork-agent[bot].
FILES_PUSHED:              YES — full codebase synced to owner GitHub
GITHUB_SHA:                dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8 (main, 2026-07-09 18:12 UTC)
RENDER_CONNECTED_REPO:     https://github.com/ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1  ← MISMATCH
                           (branch: main, auto-deploy: ON, service: ivx-holdings-platform)
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:          dep-d980mk4g95ps73dc8390 (status: live)
LIVE_HEALTH:               OK — commit de4cb0b2, boot 2026-07-09 20:59 UTC
LIVE_VERSION:              OK — commit de4cb0b2 (matches Render deploy)
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:   NO — deployed SHA de4cb0b2 does NOT exist in
                           rork-global-real-estate-invest (it lives in rork-ivxholding--1)
RORK_CODE_CONTROL_STATUS:  Rork syncs code TO your GitHub — your repo holds a full copy.
                           The sandbox remote cannot be removed; it is the pipe that
                           delivers code to your GitHub. Disconnecting sync is done in
                           Rork project Settings → GitHub, not from here.
BLOCKERS:                  1) Render is pointed at the OLD repo (rork-ivxholding--1).
                              Fix: Render Dashboard → ivx-holdings-platform → Settings →
                              Build & Deploy → change repo to
                              ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest, branch main.
                              (Or give me your RENDER_API_KEY and I'll switch it via API.)
                           2) I cannot push/rewire git remotes — read-only git access.
FINAL_STATUS:              NOT_VERIFIED — code IS in your GitHub, but production deploys
                           from the old repo, so SHAs can't match yet.
```

The single action that flips this to VERIFIED: repoint Render from `rork-ivxholding--1` to `rork-global-real-estate-invest`. After the next deploy, GitHub HEAD and `/version` SHA will match. Want me to do the Render switch via API? Just provide the key:

envs.name: RENDER_API_KEY
envs.description: Render API key (Render Dashboard → Account Settings → API Keys). Needed to repoint the ivx-holdings-platform service to your canonical GitHub repo and trigger a fresh deploy.
